text: >> Hello. >> Hello. >> Good afternoon. >> Good afternoon. >> This is Melissa. >> When you finished recording-- >> I'm calling you because there are pending groceries and trash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Alabama State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? >> Yes, so I was asking if you received the notification about the funding credits on your Medicare plan. >> Message urgent, press 2. To mark your message private, press 3. To send your message as is, press pound. Are you still there?
